name: canonicalize trims and collapses internal whitespace (INV-1 casing does not apply)
preserves lowercase casing; names are NOT ASCII-folded (INV-1 is cell-values only)
preserves uppercase casing; names are NOT ASCII-folded (INV-1 is cell-values only)
preserves a cedilla given name byte-equal after NFC
preserves a Han name byte-equal after NFC
NFC-normalizes a decomposed e plus combining acute to the precomposed form
accepts a 40-grapheme name (the max boundary)
rejects a 41-grapheme name as NAME_TOO_LONG (the server grapheme count is authoritative, R7)
counts a multi-codepoint ZWJ family emoji as one grapheme, so it passes (R7)
counts a regional-indicator flag as one grapheme, so it passes (R7)
accepts an internal ZWJ inside a valid emoji grapheme cluster; the zero-width check does not fire inside a cluster
rejects a name containing U+0000 as NAME_INVALID
rejects a name containing a newline as NAME_INVALID (a name is one line)
rejects a name containing a tab as NAME_INVALID (a name is one line)
rejects a lone zero-width space U+200B as NAME_INVALID
rejects a bidi override U+202E as NAME_INVALID (spoofs visible order)
rejects the empty string as NAME_REQUIRED
rejects a whitespace-only name as NAME_REQUIRED (canonicalizes to empty)
accepts exactly one grapheme (the min boundary)
sanitize strips a disallowed scalar without trimming or collapsing whitespace (R6)
sanitize caps at 40 graphemes without trimming or collapsing (R6)
sanitize keeps an internal ZWJ inside a valid emoji cluster (does not fire inside a grapheme)
sanitize strips a bidi override but leaves surrounding text and spaces intact (R6)
